iterations.theme: The Exponential Growth of the App Economy and Emerging Consolidation
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration concludes the discussion on the overall market size, consumer payment trends, regulatory challenges, and the 'Berkshire Hathaway' concept of app consolidation, before transitioning to the B2B/B2C app blending.

iterations.theme: The Evolution of App Business Models, Growth Strategies, and Untapped 'Killer Categories'
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration begins with the shift towards B2B opportunities for B2C apps and continues through the discussion of the 'Three Cs' framework, identifying new 'killer categories,' and concluding with success stories and advice for app founders.
